name: DND NERDS
description: DND Nerds specializes in unique comic publications that capture the imaginative and often humorous world of Dungeons & Dragons sessions. Embracing a boutique approach, we focus on small print runs that ensure quality and exclusivity. Our comics feature adult humor and relatable situations, providing a fresh take on the joys and challenges faced by tabletop gamers. With an emphasis on storytelling and artistic expression, we are dedicated to creating a vibrant community where every roll of the dice leads to new adventures.
logo: A stylized waning gibbous moon in white and cyan with a wide black outline. The top half features the letters 'DND' with the 'N' centered on the midline of the moon, and the Ds extending to the edges of the moon.   The lettering should be bold cyan, with the 'D' changing to white where it crosses the dark side of the moon. The bottom half has the word 'NERDS' in smaller block capital print, centered on the midline of the moon, using a sans serif font with a vintage feel. The shading is flat without gradients.
